meta.title: A.I. Rebirth of the Worst Band of All Time
meta.description:
Yeah new music by the shaggs with A.I.!!
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Jump on the hype train for this channel, and help me crank out even more wicked videos like this one:
https://www.patreon.com/NobodyandTheComputer
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------
contact me: 
nobodyandthecomputer@gmail.com
__________________________________________________
Colab Notebook for Shaggs instrumental generation:
https://www.patreon.com/posts/shaggs-notebook-95021734

Colab Notebook for stem isolation based on demucs:
https://www.patreon.com/posts/shaggs-notebook-95021734
__________________________________________________
Tools used in the video:
GPT playground:
https://platform.openai.com/playground
META AudioGen and MusicGEN
https://about.fb.com/news/2023/08/audiocraft-generative-ai-for-music-and-audio/
SUNO:
https://www.suno.ai/
A.I. videos:
Pika Labs.
https://www.pika.art/
__________________________________________________

00:00 Intro
02:22 Fran Zappa and the history of The Shaggs
05:01 Kurt Cobain and why The Shaggs and A.I: one ❤️
06:00 How to make new music with A.I.
10:08 A.I. Shaggs' songs
12:01 Outro
